title: Implement drag-drop variations from figma spec: row, cell, table, template
description: Add 4 new variants from the Atom Drag Drop figma spec. Row: reorder rows by dragging. Cell: move cells between positions in a grid. Table: comprehensive table with row reorder + cell move + column sort. Template: multi-zone layout drop targets (main, left-main, left-main-right, complete).
resolution: Added 4 new drag-drop variants from figma spec: row (reorder by dragging), cell (grid swap), table (row reorder + file drop per row), template (13 multi-zone layouts with labeled drop targets). 10 required DOM roles proved in builder + CSS. Fixed prove to recognize el() role pattern alongside elAttrs. All 16 prove commands pass (5415 checks, 0 failures).
